case_title: PATEL, BHAVANBHAI S. vs. GANDY, TIMOTHY et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT SOKAL, NIKI ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES

JUDGE PRO TEM:DAN DUNCAN/CLERK:ECLAVERIA C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. PLFF APPEARED THRU COUNSEL ARNOLD EVJI, AND BOTH DEFTS PRESENT AND REPRESENTING THEMSELVES. CASE SETTLED AND TERMS OF SETTLEMENT EMBODIED IN THE "JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION" SIGNED BY BOTH DEFTS. REPORTER WAIVED - NOT ON RECORD.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOKAL, NIKI GANDY, TIMOTHY  (SUED AS GRANDY) THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 74 TURK STREET #42, S.F., STAYED UNTIL FEB-17-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, 5OM. NO FURTHER STAYS. IF DFTS DO NOT VACATE, DFTS TO PAY $200- BACK RENT + $14.29 PER DAY DAMAGES FROM 12/29/97 THRU 2/17/98 + $165- COSTS (TOTAL $1,093.79). MUTUAL WAIVER OF CLAIMS INCL 1542CC. PROPERTY LEFT DEEMED ABANDONED. NO ONE ELSE HAS RIGHT TO CLAIM POSSESSION.
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT GANDY, TIMOTHY  (SUED AS GRANDY) ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES
